costume, prop, and northern material handoff for oppressive human face, real biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, narrow murderous eyes, white bear fur mantle, silver-black bone-iron armor, bronze bracers, bone-iron shield, guard axe, jade clasp, red oath cord, and ice-stud boots
assets.qc_summary: Pass: final board reads as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female warrior guard with an oppressive human face, real biological bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, narrow murderous eyes, and elite heavy guard equipment. It avoids rejected directions: v001 Frosthoof deer guard, v002 bear-face beast-head guard, and v03 soft/fake-ear guard. The locked Wanshou emblem is not redesigned; northern symbol language remains object/material-based.
